title: PlausiDen — docs
description: Read the manifesto, install Forge, ship typed in 60 seconds.

sections.title: Ship a typed site in 60 seconds.
sections.lede: Forge is one cargo install away. From zero to deployed in three commands.

sections.caption: Pinned cargo install. No CDN, no curl-pipe-bash.
sections.body:
$ cargo install --git https://github.com/thepictishbeast/PlausiDen-Forge \
    --locked --tag v0.18 forge-cli

$ forge --version
forge 0.18 (commit c091b54, built 2026-05-18)

sections.text: Every page is one JSON file. Drop it in cms/ and Forge builds it. Editor autocomplete via the JSON Schema reference.

sections.caption: cms/landing.json — a complete page in 20 lines.
27 audit phases, one report, deterministic output.
sections.body:
$ forge build
== phase: tokens ==
  ok      no findings (1ms)
== phase: html_semantic ==
  ok      no findings (2ms)
== phase: csp ==
  ok      no findings (0ms)
== phase: a11y_landmarks ==
  ok      no findings (1ms)
== phase: theme_contrast ==
  ok      no findings (28ms)
== summary ==
  mode:                production
  strict findings:     0
  duration:            66ms
  signature:           ed25519 (verified)
forge build OK

sections.text: The output lives in static/. Copy it anywhere — Caddy, nginx, IPFS, Tor hidden service, S3, your laptop. The audit report in reports/ is verifiable independently.

sections.body:
$ rsync -av static/ user@your-host:/var/www/your-site/
$ forge verify reports/build-20260518T074342Z.json --chain --signatures

items.hint: hero, banner, group, card_feed, sidebar, composer, form, picture, paragraph, heading, kv_pair, logo_wall, quote, code.
Loaded automatically; pick via data-theme attribute or via the in-page toggle.
Configured in forge.toml; each phase's strictness is operator-controllable.
cms-schema.json at project root. Editor LSPs (VS Code, Helix, Zed) provide inline autocomplete.

sections.title: Read the source.
sections.lede: Forge, Loom, Crawler, Annotator, CMS are all open source. Every commit is signed. Every PR is reviewed against the discipline gate.
